instruction: Severe thunderstorm on Route A, reroute needed from Dallas to Austin.
input: Route A (I-35): High winds and hail reported. Route B (US-281): Clear skies. Vehicle height: 13ft. Route B Bridge Limit: 14ft.

instruction: Traffic collision on I-10 Eastbound, requesting reroute.
input: I-10 E blocked for 3 hours. Alternate route via Hwy 90 is clear, adds 45 mins. Load is non-perishable.

instruction: Bridge maintenance on I-80, investigate alternate route via local roads.
input: Alternate route includes Main St bridge with 10ft clearance. Vehicle height is 12ft.

instruction: Snowstorm advisory on mountain pass, requesting low-altitude reroute.
input: Low-altitude route clear of snow but includes weight restricted bridge (20 tons). Truck weight is 25 tons.

instruction: Flash flood warning on primary state highway.
input: Primary highway flooded. Secondary route available, high elevation, no flood risk. Vehicle specs within all limits.

instruction: Wildfire smoke reducing visibility to zero on I-5.
input: Reroute via coastal highway proposed. Air quality reported as acceptable. No constraints violated.

instruction: Roadworks causing 2 hour delay on Route 66.
input: Alternate route available via county roads. Includes residential zone restriction for heavy commercial vehicles 10PM-6AM. Current ETA 11PM. Vehicle is heavy commercial.
Bypass route proposed using toll highway. Toll account is active. No size/weight violations.
Shelter-in-place order issued for current county. Proposed reroute enters the warning zone.
Alternate route covered by protective structures (tunnels/overpasses) identified. Clear of hail.

instruction: Reroute Chicago to KC due to snow.
input: I-55 South to I-70 West is clear. No bridge or weight constraints violated.

instruction: Snow on I-70, reroute Chicago to Kansas City.
input: I-55 South to I-70 West is clear. No bridge or weight constraints violated.

instruction: Reroute requested due to accident on main highway.
input: Bypass route available. Vehicle clearance 13ft. Lowest bridge on bypass is 14ft.

instruction: Reroute requested due to accident on main highway.
input: Bypass route available. Vehicle clearance 13ft. Lowest bridge on bypass is 14ft. NOTE: Construction dropped bridge clearance to 12.5ft.

instruction: Reroute needed from Seattle to Portland due to landslide.
input: East alternate route available via mountains. Weather clear. Truck is empty, no weight restrictions apply.
